description_long: This object is a stylized bunch of grapes featuring a long, slightly curved brown stem with multiple purple grape berries attached along its length. Each grape is round and plump, with a smooth surface and a small green leaf at its attachment point to the stem. The grapes are spaced along the stem in a loosely clustered, elongated arrangement, rather than being tightly packed. The stem is prominent and textured, giving a naturalistic appearance, while the grapes themselves are uniform in size and color. The overall shape of the bunch is cylindrical, with the grapes distributed on both sides of the stem. The colors are vivid, with deep purple grapes, bright green leaves, and a medium brown stem.
description: A stylized, elongated bunch of purple grapes with green leaves and a prominent brown stem, arranged in a loose cylindrical cluster.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the brown stem running centrally with purple grapes and green leaves visible on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the brown stem and the distribution of grapes hanging below it, with leaves interspersed.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view focusing on the alignment of grapes along the stem, with the stem appearing more prominent and grapes visible on either side.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the cylindrical arrangement of grapes and the textured brown stem, with leaves and grapes clearly visible.
